# ADClientError.Code

**Enumeration**

The error codes that pass from the attribution response to the completion handler.

## Declaration

```swift
enum Code
```

## Overview

The group of error codes that pass from the attribution response to the completion handler block when you call the [doc://com.apple.iad/documentation/iAd/ADClient/requestAttributionDetails(_:)] method.

## Error Codes

- **ADClientError.Code.corruptResponse**: The response from the attribution server is corrupt.
- **ADClientError.Code.requestClientError**: The response from the attribution server has an HTTP 4xx status code.
- **ADClientError.Code.requestNetworkError**: The communication with the attribution server has a network error.
- **ADClientError.Code.requestServerError**: The response from the attribution server has an HTTP 5xx status code.
- **ADClientError.Code.trackingRestrictedOrDenied**: The user has a restricted status or has denied tracking for the calling app.
- **ADClientError.Code.missingData**: The downloaded app has a payload without enough data to perform an attribution check.
- **ADClientError.Code.unsupportedPlatform**: The system doesn’t support the platform for the attribution API call.
- **ADClientError.Code.unknown**: The response from the attribution server has an unknown error.
- **limitAdTracking**

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Attribution Errors

- **ADClientErrorDomain**: The error domain that passes to the completion handler.
- **ADClientError**: The group of error codes that pass from the attribution response to the completion handler block.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
